notes: Reference transcript for the impaired-with-hard-plan branch: status=impaired + planned_session_type=hard → downgrade_session_to_mobility_only with reason_token. Not evidence of live skill behaviour.

rationale: sleep_debt=elevated: 5h48m of sleep, compounding prior nights
resting_hr_vs_baseline=well_above: ratio 1.19, three-system signal of incomplete recovery
training_load=spike: 1.55x 7d baseline, acute load well above capacity
recovery_status=impaired against a hard plan → mobility-only today

follow_up.review_question: Did yesterday's mobility-only day help your recovery?
